title: Trachyrhizum appendiculoides
taxonomy: Trachyrhizum appendiculoides is a species of flowering plant, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Brassicaceae and the order Brassicales. This plant is a member of the genus Trachyrhizum, which is a small genus of plants. Trachyrhizum appendiculoides is native to China and is often found in alpine meadows and rocky areas. Its classification as a Brassicaceae plant places it among other species of mustard and cabbage relatives. Further classification may include its species-specific characteristics and relationships to other plants within the family.
